creator: freqlabs@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have been running this updated port for a week or so, everything seems to have gone smoothly. Patch below:

diff --git a/devel/py-buildbot/Makefile b/devel/py-buildbot/Makefile
index edf0f525d8472..325e6498db3e4 100644
--- a/devel/py-buildbot/Makefile
+++ b/devel/py-buildbot/Makefile
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	buildbot
-PORTVERSION=	2.7.0
+PORTVERSION=	2.10.0
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
diff --git a/devel/py-buildbot/distinfo b/devel/py-buildbot/distinfo
index e401253cc9a06..51b044c3e30ac 100644
--- a/devel/py-buildbot/distinfo
+++ b/devel/py-buildbot/distinfo
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-TIMESTAMP = 1584864563
-SHA256 (buildbot-2.7.0.tar.gz) = 069001b73c5da8acc69f22cfab87740c8d4ba9c6f72da7f760fdd8100c74484a
-SIZE (buildbot-2.7.0.tar.gz) = 3175050
+TIMESTAMP = 1612203637
+SHA256 (buildbot-2.10.0.tar.gz) = 8eff3f59325d2a914aa4b2f2ab3fa4a589743248c5b800b10edd33755fb9cf19
+SIZE (buildbot-2.10.0.tar.gz) = 2270072
